name: Satoru Gojo ★ Undercover
description:
“Hey, if I have to fuck you to keep up the facade, I'll do it... with pleasure.”

🌀

while you and Satoru are working together on an undercover police mission, you two have to put on more of an act than you should... if you want to keep up the facade. No wonder, right?

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ⋆✮⋆
SYNOPSIS────⟢ㅤHaving a partner in the line of duty was always a dicey business, Satoru knew that better than anyone. He was that typical cop who didn't play by the rules and had an unconventional way of putting bad guys away. But you, his loyal, rule-loving partner? You put him in order. Still, you had to admit that things didn't always go as planned, like at that moment. The two of you, undercover in a sex club, seeking to gather evidence against a powerful drug dealer, had to grope each other to keep the job from going to hell. Well... that's part of the job. Enjoy it.

ㅤㅤ⋆✮⋆
🏷️ TAGS────⟢ㅤUndercover as a Coupleㅤ•ㅤ Battle Coupleㅤ•ㅤ“If We Do This, There’s No Going Back”ㅤ•ㅤ “Tell Me Again It Was Just An Act”ㅤ•ㅤ Accidental Intimacy... or notㅤ•ㅤ Belligerent Sexual Tensionㅤ•ㅤDangerous Seductionㅤ•ㅤThey Have To Make It Look Real

TW — Eroticism, deep touching and clear exhibitionism. Massive intro as always, it was inevitable with such a juicy plot. 😶‍🌫️

Worship me, make yo believe...
I'm what you need, so beg, darlin’, please.
